zh.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassal是Sir Humphrey d'Ervassal和Mrs Humphrey d'Ervassal的女兒，於1300年1月1日出生在英國史洛普爾。她於1323年與Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1351年5月1日在英國史洛普爾盧德洛福享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassal是Sir Humphrey d'Ervassal和Mrs Humphrey d'Ervassal的女儿，于1300年1月1日出生在英国史洛普爾。她于1323年与Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1351年5月1日在英国史洛普爾盧德洛福享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassal was born on 1 January 1300, in Shropshire, England as the daughter of Sir Humphrey d'Ervassal and Mrs Humphrey d'Ervassal. She married Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle in 1323, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 1 May 1351, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassal est née le 1 janvier 1300, à Shropshire, Angleterre, fille de Sir Humphrey d'Ervassal et Mrs Humphrey d'Ervassal. Elle a épousé Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle en 1323, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 mai 1351, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassal wurde am 1. Januar 1300 in Shropshire, England, als Tochter von Sir Humphrey d'Ervassal und Mrs Humphrey d'Ervassal geboren. Sie hat 1323 in Shropshire, England Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 1. Mai 1351 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Ludlow, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassal è nata il il 1 gennaio 1300 nel Shropshire, England come figlia di Sir Humphrey d'Ervassal e Mrs Humphrey d'Ervassal. Lei sposato Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle nel 1323, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 1 maggio 1351, nel Ludlow, Shropshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassalは1300年1月1日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでSir Humphrey d'ErvassalとMrs Humphrey d'Ervassalの娘として生まれた。1323年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでSir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1351年5月1日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassal(은)는 1300년 1월 1일 영국 슈럽실르에서 Sir Humphrey d'Ervassal(와)과 Mrs Humphrey d'Ervassal의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1323년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1351년 5월 1일 영국 슈럽실르 루들로에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.1 Jan 1300–1 May 1351: 1300 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1–1351 оны Тавдугаар сарын 1

pt.1 Jan 1300–1 May 1351: 1 de janeiro de 1300–1 de maio de 1351
pt.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassal nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1300, em Shropshire, Inglaterra filha de Sir Humphrey d'Ervassal e Mrs Humphrey d'Ervassal. Ela casou-se com Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle em 1323, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1 de maio de 1351, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassal родилась 1 января 1300 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir Humphrey d'Ervassal и Mrs Humphrey d'Ervassal. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle в 1323 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 1 мая 1351 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.1 Jan 1300–1 May 1351: 1 de enero de 1300–1 de mayo de 1351
es.lifeSummary: Hawise D'Ervassal nació el 1 de enero de 1300, en Shropshire, Inglaterra como hija de Sir Humphrey d'Ervassal y Mrs Humphrey d'Ervassal. Se casó con Sir Laurence de Ludlow, Lord of Stokesay Castle en 1323, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1351, en Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
